title: Engine 181 Portable Master Stream
question: Engine 181 is supplying a portable monitor with two 200’ 2½” lines. The monitor is flowing 500 GPM with a master stream nozzle pressure of 80 PSI. Use 15 PSI appliance loss for the portable monitor. What pump pressure should the operator set?

sceneElements.engine: Engine 181 positioned on the street side of a commercial building
hoses: Two 200’ 2½” supply lines from Engine 181 to portable monitor
nozzles: Portable master stream nozzle flowing 500 GPM @ 80 PSI

formulaBreakdown: Two equal 2½” lines means each line carries 250 GPM
FL = C × (GPM / 100)^2 × hose length in hundreds
